description: The SimplexTexture component is used to generate procedural noise to use in any material.

fields.Offset: How much to shift the procedural noise.
fields.Scale: scales the pattern up or down inside the image.
fields.Background: The background color of the noise.
fields.Foreground: The color of the noise itself.
fields.Use3D: Whether to allow ``ZOffset`` to affect the texture, and generates 3D noise.
fields.ZOffset: The offset in the 3D noise, which takes a slice of the 3D noise for the texture.

usage: Insert into any material to view what this texture looks like.
